modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about Google Docs size limitations.

full_description_text: During a recent call, the user asked about the size limits for Google Docs. They were unsure if their document would exceed any restrictions while working on a project. This concern about document size could impact their ability to save or share files effectively.
short_description: Inquiry about Google Docs size limitations.
description: During a recent call, the user asked about the size limits for Google Docs. They were unsure if their document would exceed any restrictions while working on a project. This concern about document size could impact their ability to save or share files effectively.
